reviews.comment:
Y no hay mucho para decir. Es una ACA creo mantiene su estilo clásico que los hace estéticamente distintos a cualquier estación de servicio. De ahí no hay mucho para agregar. Lindo lugar para tomar un café

(Translated by Google)
And there's not much to say. It's an ACA, I think, and it maintains its classic style that makes it aesthetically distinct from any other service station. Beyond that, there's not much to add. Nice place to have a coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15009815123652831665/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDbU5QLWtRRRAB
